nasb.text: It was at this time that He went off to the mountain to pray, and He spent the whole night in prayer to God.

esv.text: In these days he went out to the mountain to pray, and all night he continued in prayer to God.

cnv.text: 在那些日子，有一次耶穌出去到山上禱告，整夜禱告　神。

ccb.text: 一天，耶稣到山上整夜向上帝祷告。

csbs.text: 就在那些日子里，耶稣有一次出去到山上祷告；他整夜向神祷告。
